name: should create a query with an N+1 column
description: Test case for should create a query with an N+1 column
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2017,2018,2019,2020,2021,2022,2023]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years WHERE player.pos IN ('WR')), "t335663aa03c109b219d83d28dc9b4e11" as (select COALESCE(trg_pid) as pid, "nfl_plays"."year", SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as trg_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' group by "nfl_plays"."year", COALESCE(trg_pid) having SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >= '55'), "t423257ea00ed1a9545f48158ff6af665" as (select "pg"."pid", ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN CASE WHEN nfl_plays.first_down THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.first_down THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), 2) as recv_first_down_share_from_plays, "nfl_plays"."year" from "nfl_plays" inner join "player_gamelogs" as "pg" on "nfl_plays"."esbid" = "pg"."esbid" and "nfl_plays"."off" = "pg"."tm" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and ("trg_pid" is not null) group by "pg"."pid", "nfl_plays"."year"), "ta6e9d0cba1586e7c96bcc9f06277651b" as (select COALESCE(trg_pid) as pid, "nfl_plays"."year", SUM(CASE WHEN comp = true THEN recv_yds ELSE 0 END) as rec_yds_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' group by "nfl_plays"."year", COALESCE(trg_pid)), "t80f9f7579fb3823f33e33cc215c65164" as (select COALESCE(bc_pid) as pid, "nfl_plays"."year", SUM(rush_yds) as rush_yds_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' group by "nfl_plays"."year", COALESCE(bc_pid)) select "tbc0f47cfe59a1398fb0e9c78eb43bba3"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "player_seasonlogs"."espn_overall_score" AS "espn_overall_score_0", "t423257ea00ed1a9545f48158ff6af665"."recv_first_down_share_from_plays" AS "recv_first_down_share_from_plays_0", "tbc0f47cfe59a1398fb0e9c78eb43bba3"."points_per_game" AS "points_per_game_from_seasonlogs_0", "t69a82a5679e0babfe7e409feb1f22d17"."points_per_game" AS "points_per_game_from_seasonlogs_1", "ta6e9d0cba1586e7c96bcc9f06277651b"."rec_yds_from_plays" AS "rec_yds_from_plays_0", "t80f9f7579fb3823f33e33cc215c65164"."rush_yds_from_plays" AS "rush_yds_from_plays_0", "tbc0f47cfe59a1398fb0e9c78eb43bba3"."year", "player"."pos" from "scoring_format_player_seasonlogs" as "tbc0f47cfe59a1398fb0e9c78eb43bba3" inner join "player" on "player"."pid" = "tbc0f47cfe59a1398fb0e9c78eb43bba3"."pid" inner join "t335663aa03c109b219d83d28dc9b4e11" on "t335663aa03c109b219d83d28dc9b4e11"."pid" = "tbc0f47cfe59a1398fb0e9c78eb43bba3"."pid" and t335663aa03c109b219d83d28dc9b4e11.year = tbc0f47cfe59a1398fb0e9c78eb43bba3.year inner join "player_seasonlogs" on "player_seasonlogs"."pid" = "tbc0f47cfe59a1398fb0e9c78eb43bba3"."pid" and player_seasonlogs.year = tbc0f47cfe59a1398fb0e9c78eb43bba3.year and "player_seasonlogs"."seas_type" = 'REG' left join "t423257ea00ed1a9545f48158ff6af665" on "t423257ea00ed1a9545f48158ff6af665"."pid" = "tbc0f47cfe59a1398fb0e9c78eb43bba3"."pid" and t423257ea00ed1a9545f48158ff6af665.year = tbc0f47cfe59a1398fb0e9c78eb43bba3.year and t423257ea00ed1a9545f48158ff6af665.year IN (2023,2022,2021,2020,2019,2018,2017) left join "scoring_format_player_seasonlogs" as "t69a82a5679e0babfe7e409feb1f22d17" on "t69a82a5679e0babfe7e409feb1f22d17"."pid" = "tbc0f47cfe59a1398fb0e9c78eb43bba3"."pid" and t69a82a5679e0babfe7e409feb1f22d17.year = tbc0f47cfe59a1398fb0e9c78eb43bba3.year + -3 and t69a82a5679e0babfe7e409feb1f22d17.scoring_format_hash = 'ad64bf40cdfec0a1ebdf66453fa57687832f7556f3870251c044d5d270fc089e' left join "ta6e9d0cba1586e7c96bcc9f06277651b" on "ta6e9d0cba1586e7c96bcc9f06277651b"."pid" = "tbc0f47cfe59a1398fb0e9c78eb43bba3"."pid" and ta6e9d0cba1586e7c96bcc9f06277651b.year = tbc0f47cfe59a1398fb0e9c78eb43bba3.year + 1 left join "t80f9f7579fb3823f33e33cc215c65164" on "t80f9f7579fb3823f33e33cc215c65164"."pid" = "tbc0f47cfe59a1398fb0e9c78eb43bba3"."pid" and t80f9f7579fb3823f33e33cc215c65164.year = tbc0f47cfe59a1398fb0e9c78eb43bba3.year + 1 where "tbc0f47cfe59a1398fb0e9c78eb43bba3"."scoring_format_hash" = 'ad64bf40cdfec0a1ebdf66453fa57687832f7556f3870251c044d5d270fc089e' and player.pos IN ('WR') and player_seasonlogs.espn_overall_score > '0' group by player.fname, player.lname, "player_seasonlogs"."espn_overall_score", "t423257ea00ed1a9545f48158ff6af665"."recv_first_down_share_from_plays", "tbc0f47cfe59a1398fb0e9c78eb43bba3"."points_per_game", "t69a82a5679e0babfe7e409feb1f22d17"."points_per_game", "ta6e9d0cba1586e7c96bcc9f06277651b"."rec_yds_from_plays", "t80f9f7579fb3823f33e33cc215c65164"."rush_yds_from_plays", "tbc0f47cfe59a1398fb0e9c78eb43bba3"."year", "tbc0f47cfe59a1398fb0e9c78eb43bba3"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 6 DESC NULLS LAST, "tbc0f47cfe59a1398fb0e9c78eb43bba3"."pid" asc limit 500
